title: Socky
description: A Minecraft mod that adds recipes and models for cute stuffed animals.
body:
A Minecraft mod that adds recipes and models for cute stuffed animals.

# 📖 What is this mod?

Have you ever felt like your dwellings were cold, utilitarian places?
Nothing makes a home feel cozier than soft pillows and cute stuffed animals!

Socky is a lightweight mod that adds stuffed animals to the game.
For now, these are purely decorative items intended to make you feel better every time you go back to your base.

# ✅ Features

![Socky and Blocky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/6518c1316743469e343d3ad8cf1dd03722127c49.png)

## Ingredients
- **[Smol Body](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/b691eeed40e8c6347af23817efc8b8f7d6f97462.png)** - Essential ingredient for all plushie friends.
- **[Smol Cape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/a1e1cecac1f8d9316d85be4dba51605080f050de.png)** - Makes your stuffies more heroic.
- **[Smol Pants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/b3aeccbd4f8d7e7e820fd46df1f10fce33e98f24.png)** - Preserves your stuffies' modesty.
- **[Smol Scarf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/107a6136d359272cad1f96de3e88b7969e771eb3.png)** - Adds a dash of style, essential for bringing out a stuffy's personality.

## Blocks
- **[Socky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/ae1be320e68da7591de9e2526cd45c1d868ad1e4.png)** - Adorable, all-purpose stuffy ready for any adventure.
- **[Blocky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/b3f14be55f92b2de9399cc4394a6c4bf3dd8d8cf.png)** - An efficient way to bundle up several Sockies for storage, or when you need to increase the density of cuteness.
- **[Ambrose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/1f3902112432e85ba742ab816bc951ba10234809.png)** - Is he a stuffy? Is he a moose? He's a hero.
- **[Mr. Olive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/f33343da0e5484565a7cf29e8712bcbda48bcabe.png)** - A gentleman and a scholar.
- **[Push Push](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VKML5JZk/images/9f1fd7a0fd491b9d0ebf06e59c5c23bcd01db4e4.png)** - Squishy and wild.

# 📖 Usage

Socky is simple and lightweight, to ensure as many people as possible can benefit from a little extra cuteness.

Install it in your mods folder along with [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
